_meta.layer: Core Thesis Factory v1 — Single-Name Decision Sheet (单票决策书)
_meta.disclaimer: INTERNAL, UNVALIDATED research output of the model-recommendation pilot — not validated alpha, not external/personalized investment advice; sizing fields are SUGGESTIONS only; the human executes. Quality gate = human red-team (auto checks are the floor only).

sector_theme.zh: 半导体材料 · CMP 抛光垫国产龙头 · 耗材复购+认证锁定
sector_theme.en: Semiconductor materials · domestic CMP-pad leader · consumable repurchase + qualification lock-in

provenance.research_core_lineage: CTF batch-1 ticker #3 — discovered via Serenity Scan #1 (docs/research/serenity/SCAN_1_AI_SEMIS.md, #68 merged; serenity_score 73 = T2 [unvalidated intuition]); nominations ratified by Junyan 2026-06-11. Business-model diversity sample: consumable (vs BYD = OEM, 华海 = equipment) to test template generalization
provenance.generation_note: fresh-generation path per CTF spec §4 + #67: production api/research 8-step thesis generated 2026-06-11 (auto _quality 90 = FLOOR only; committed at cores/api_generated/300054_SZ_20260611.json), then FACT-CHECKED against a dedicated web fact pack. Material api errors corrected: FY25 revenue stated 4.1B (actual ¥3.66B E1), GM 37.4% (actual 50.85%), 'semi mix crossing 50% by end-2026' as the variant when FY25 mix is ALREADY 57% (stale variant), price/PE anchors a year old, wrong_if referencing channel checks we don't have. Finding logged: same api data-layer gap as 688120 — closes via this PR's watchlist extension
provenance.factcheck_basis: two-agent web fact pack 2026-06-11: price/share count from exchange feed + 权益分派实施公告 (E1, share count 952,857,355 cross-checked against market cap); Q1 absolutes from 一季报 PDF 原文 (E1); pad/segment splits from 年报摘要 + 业绩预告变动说明 + IR记录 PDF×4 (E1/E2 as tagged); consensus from 开源 3/31 / 东海 5/12 (E2)

variant_perception.zh: 市场相信:'CMP 国产化双雄'是存储扩产主题的材料分支,按主题轮动定价(5/26 历史新高 81.58 → 6/8 回撤 -21% → 三日 V 形反弹 +16%,6/11 收 75.48 无个股催化)。我们相信:这是一台被主题噪音包裹的【耗材复利机器】——Q1 已打印量价利共振(垫收入 +71.2%、毛利率 54.95% +6.13pp、归母 +78.0%),且扩产的资本效率极端(潜江第三条软垫线 30 万片/年仅需 3000 万 capex),意味着存储扩产兑现时增量利润的边际资本占用接近零。分辨问题不是'故事真不真'(Q1 数字是 E1),而是'75 元、64-68× FY26E 的价格里还剩多少'——七月中的创业板半年报业绩预告是第一个分辨点。
variant_perception.en: Market believes: the 'CMP localization duo' is the materials branch of the storage-capex theme, priced by theme rotation (5/26 ATH 81.58 → 6/8 −21% drawdown → 3-day V-shaped +16%, closing 75.48 on 6/11 with NO name-specific catalyst). We believe: under the theme noise sits a CONSUMABLE COMPOUNDER — Q1 already printed volume-price-margin resonance (pad revenue +71.2%, GM 54.95% +6.13pp, net profit +78.0%), with extreme capital efficiency on expansion (Qianjiang's third soft-pad line: 300k pads/yr for only ¥30M capex), meaning incremental profit from the storage ramp consumes near-zero marginal capital. The discriminating question is not 'is the story real' (Q1 is E1) but 'how much is left at ¥75 / 64-68x FY26E' — the ChiNext H1 forecast (~mid-July) is the first read.

mechanism.zh: 第一性链条:存储扩产(长存三期 2026H2 大规模量产、长鑫 Fab3)→ 晶圆产量 × CMP 步数 = 垫/液按片消耗(耗材,非一次性设备)→ 认证锁定(1-2 年验证周期 + 与长存共持专利)使在位者承接几乎全部增量 → 产能利用率走高(软垫 ~80%)+ 高毛利产品占比上升 → 毛利率与净利率双升(Q1 已验证)→ 半年报预告/正式报延续打印 = E1 链条闭环。第二曲线:抛光液/清洗液(Q1 0.85 亿 +54%)从低基数多点突破(5/06、5/26 两份公告:氧化铈液过存储龙头全流程验证获批量订单、铜阻挡层液、SiC 衬底液、TSV 液)。诚实锚:'国内份额 70%'是媒体/卖方口径,公司原文从未给出——本论点不依赖该数字,只依赖公司分项披露的垫收入增速与毛利率。
mechanism.en: First-principles chain: storage expansion (YMTC phase-3 mass production H2-2026, CXMT Fab3) → wafer output × CMP step count = pads/slurries consumed PER WAFER (consumables, not one-off tools) → qualification lock-in (1-2yr validation + co-owned patents with YMTC) routes nearly all incremental demand to the incumbent → utilization climbs (soft pads ~80%) + richer mix → GM and net margin rise together (Q1-verified) → the H1 forecast/report extends the print = E1 loop closed. Second curve: slurries/cleaners (Q1 ¥85M +54%) breaking out from a low base (two filings, 5/06 & 5/26: ceria slurry through FULL-FLOW validation at the leading memory house with volume orders; copper-barrier, SiC-substrate, TSV slurries). Honesty anchor: the '70% domestic share' is a media/sell-side register the company has NEVER stated — the thesis depends only on company-disclosed pad revenue growth and GM.

thesis.horizon: 6-12 months (staged E1 events: ChiNext H1 forecast ~mid-July → H1 report ~late Aug → FY26 annual)
thesis.conviction: WATCH_ONLY — R/R at the 2026-06-11 live price (≈0.29) is FAR below the 2:1 bar; even the committed 5/08 reference gives ≈0.87. STARTER eligibility begins only at the add zone (≤~54.7) or on a post-E1 re-band. No position at current price.

items.claim: 26Q1 (E1 原文): revenue ¥1.0201B +23.82%, 归母 ¥0.2510B +77.99%, 扣非 +75.24%, GM 54.95% (+6.13pp), OCF ¥0.286B; pad revenue ¥0.376B +71.19% (QoQ +27.03%), slurry+cleaner ¥0.085B +54.20% — volume-price-margin resonance is PRINTED, not forecast
items.source: 2026一季报 PDF 原文 (szse 44d330f1) + 业绩预告变动说明 4/16 (pad split) + IR记录 2026-05-08 PDF (液 split); GM/净利率 via 东海 calc

items.claim: FY2025: revenue ¥3.66B +9.66%, 归母 ¥0.720B +38.32%, GM 50.85%; semis ¥2.086B = 57% of revenue (+37.3%) vs legacy printing consumables ¥1.559B −12.97% — the mix shift the api called a 'future variant' ALREADY happened
items.source: 年报摘要 (上证报 paper.cnstock 2192555) + 开源/东海 consistent transcriptions (年报原文毛利率行项未直接核对 — logged as a data break)

items.claim: Slurry second curve at filing grade: 5/06 公告 three slurries (大硅片精抛液 / ceria 氧化铈液 through the leading memory house's FULL-FLOW validation with volume orders / TSV 先进封装液); 5/26 公告 copper-barrier slurry new-customer volume orders + SiC substrate slurry volume orders + 头部晶圆厂优秀供应商奖 — low-base (¥85M/Q) breakout with E1 anchors
items.source: 公告 2026-05-06/05-26 (证券时报 3896525 + 财联社 2380964 转述公告) — customer unnamed in filings (保密), tracked honestly

items.claim: Extreme expansion capital-efficiency: hard pads 50k/month at Wuhan (E1 公司自述); soft-pad Qianjiang 2 lines 500k/yr at ~80% utilization; THIRD line (TGV glass-substrate pads + >2m large-format) = 300k/yr for ONLY ¥30M capex, online by end-2026; Wuhan center adds 400k/yr large-silicon-wafer pads at full ramp
items.source: 扩建潜江CMP软抛光垫生产线自愿性披露公告 2026-06-09 (公告 2026-058 PDF) + IR记录 5/08 — consumable economics: incremental profit at near-zero marginal capital is the under-priced structural feature [analyst reading]

items.claim: '~70% domestic pad share' is media/sell-side register ONLY — the company's own four 2026 IR records say '市占率持续领先/国内唯一全流程/唯一垫+液+清洗液系统供应商' and never a number; the thesis is built NOT to depend on the share figure
items.source: IR记录 PDF×4 (5/08, 5/15, 5/19, 5/22 — all read in full) vs 新浪调研速递 5/09 (the 70% vehicle); honesty marker item

items.claim: Theme crowding + insider supply: 5/26 ATH (10 ATHs in a month), margin balance +16.9% in 10 days to ¥1.83B; survived NO selloff (−5.0% on 5/21, −9.95% on 5/29, −6.94% on 6/8); 6/11 +6.25% with no name catalyst; 6/8 management pre-disclosed sales (5 executives, ≤0.054% of shares, window 6/30-9/29) amid a sector-wide insider-selling wave (93 semis names YTD)
items.source: exchange feed + 腾讯K线 (E1 行情) + 减持预披露公告 2026-056 PDF (E1) + stcn 5/26 两融 (E2) — tracked as crowding/supply, not support

items.claim: Integration & diversification drag: Haofei (lithium-battery auxiliaries, ¥630M for 70%) consolidated from Mar-2026 — goodwill jumped ¥5.37B→¥9.17B (+70.6%); financial expenses +578% in Q1 (borrowings + convertible interest + FX); legacy printing business divested in part (4/03 公告, ~¥440M cash back)
items.source: 2026一季报 PDF (goodwill/财务费用/合并范围 E1) + IR记录 5/08 (Haofei Q1 rev ¥157M +40.75%) + 公告 2026-04-03

rule_x_check.why: The forward mechanism (pad/slurry volume-price-margin) is re-confirmable by issuer disclosure: the company has an established practice of disclosing pad-revenue splits in 业绩预告变动说明 (Q1 demonstrated) and segment lines in periodic reports; GM/net profit are mandatory line items. ChiNext rules add an H1 forecast (~mid-July) as an EARLY staged checkpoint. The 70%-share register is explicitly non-load-bearing (unconfirmable by issuer → excluded per Rule-X discipline).

evidence.contrarian_view: Bears: (1) 64-68x FY26E consensus PE has already paid for the growth — the consumable-compounder story is the CONSENSUS, not a variant (开源+东海 both covering, dense May institutional visits); (2) the company is a serial diversifier (printing → semis → lithium auxiliaries) — Haofei's ¥9.17B goodwill is the live exhibit, and the 4/03 printing divestment shows management itself pruning the last diversification; (3) pad demand is DERIVATIVE of storage capex — if YMTC phase-3 / CXMT Fab3 schedules slip, the 'volume' leg defers while the multiple de-rates first; (4) DuPont/Cabot can defend share with price — a price war compresses exactly the GM line the thesis lives on; (5) management selling into the rally (however small) plus a sector-wide insider-selling wave is supply pressure at the margin; (6) financial expenses +578% and a convertible deep in the money (转股价 28.38 vs 75.48) imply future share-count creep.

event.zh: 创业板 2026 半年报业绩预告(分阶段 E1 第一站;历史上含垫收入拆分的变动说明)
event.en: ChiNext 2026 H1 forecast (first staged E1; historically carries pad-split commentary)

catalyst_calendar.watch: 归母区间、垫/液增速口径
catalyst_calendar.expected: 归母 YoY ≥+40% with pad commentary ≥+50% keeps the resonance thesis; <+25% fires wrong_if early

catalyst_calendar.watch: 垫收入同比、毛利率、归母同比、商誉减值迹象、皓飞并表贡献
catalyst_calendar.expected: pad ≥+30% & GM ≥48% confirms; thresholds below fire wrong_if

event.zh: 除权除息(10派1)+ 高管减持窗口

catalyst_calendar.watch: 减持是否超出已预披露 0.054%;新增预披露公告
catalyst_calendar.expected: within-disclosure selling = noise; escalation >0.5% cumulative fires wrong_if #4

event.zh: 潜江三线/武汉中心建设节点 + 存储双雄(长存/长鑫)扩产与 IPO 新闻流
event.en: Qianjiang line-3 / Wuhan center milestones + storage-duo (YMTC/CXMT) capex & IPO newsflow

catalyst_calendar.date: rolling H2-2026 (line-3 target: built by end-2026)
catalyst_calendar.watch: 建成投产公告;长存三期量产节奏的公告级信号
catalyst_calendar.expected: on-schedule = supportive; slip defers the volume leg — theme beta CROWDING-flagged, not load-bearing

triggers.metric: 2026 H1 CMP 抛光垫收入同比 (pad revenue YoY)
triggers.threshold: < +30% (Q1 +71.2%; 若半年报/预告均不披露分项 → INSUFFICIENT_DISCLOSURE,不猜测)
triggers.source: 半年报业绩预告变动说明 或 2026 半年报分项披露(公司有 Q1 披露先例)
2026 半年报 合并利润表

triggers.metric: 2026 H1 归母净利同比 (net profit YoY)
triggers.source: 2026 半年报(或 7 月中预告区间下沿)

triggers.metric: 董监高/控股股东累计新增减持预披露 (cumulative NEW insider-sale pre-disclosures beyond the 6/08 filing)

note.zh: 第 1 条依赖分项披露,按 if_not_disclosed 协议处理(公司有 Q1 拆分先例,缺席本身即信息);第 2/3 条绑定强制披露科目;第 4 条为供给侧诚实触发器(6/08 已预披露的 0.054% 不计入)。任一触发即复核;触发后未更新决策书记为诚实性失败。
note.en: Trigger 1 depends on segment disclosure, handled via if_not_disclosed (the company has the Q1 precedent — absence is itself information); 2/3 bind to mandatory line items; 4 is the supply-side honesty trigger (the pre-disclosed 0.054% does not count). Any trigger forces review; an un-updated sheet after a trigger is an honesty failure.

valuation_target_range.basis: net-profit path × PE scenarios ÷ 952,857,355 shares (E1: 权益分派实施公告 6/10, cross-checked mc=shares×price exactly). Anchors: FY25 NP ¥0.720B (E1); consensus FY26E ¥1.050-1.126B / FY27E ¥1.329-1.392B (东海/开源, E2). Automated valuation stack NOT yet run (watchlist-driven; fetch lands after this PR) — band analyst-constructed; every multiple [unvalidated intuition] with stated anchors. 6/17 除权(10派1)对每股数影响 ~0.1 元,忽略不计入区间数学.

assumptions: storage capex slips (长存三期/长鑫 Fab3 推迟) — the volume leg defers; pad pricing pressured by DuPont/Cabot defense
FY2026 NP lands ≈¥0.92B (+28% — Q1 momentum fades through H2, still growth)
theme exits; diversified-materials PE 38-43x [unvalidated intuition; goodwill overhang caps the trough multiple]
consensus lands: FY2026 NP ≈¥1.09B (+51%, within 东海 1.050 / 开源 1.126)
consumable-leader PE 49-55x [unvalidated intuition; premium to equipment for recurring revenue, discount for goodwill+diversification history]
storage ramp on schedule AND slurry second curve compounds (液类从 0.85亿/Q 低基数翻倍路径) — FY27E ¥1.36B effectively prints early
market holds 58-63x on the pulled-forward number [unvalidated intuition]

valuation_target_range.sensitivity_note: every scenario = (profit path × PE) ÷ the FIXED 952.9M share count (convertible conversion at 28.38 would add ~creep — not in the math, flagged); ±5x PE moves bands ~9-10%; the profit path resolves in STAGES (July forecast → August report), earlier than most A-share names

summary.zh: 两个口径的 R/R 都不达标:按 6/11 实价 75.48(E2 行情),R/R≈0.29——基本面是三票里最强(Q1 共振已打印),但入场数学是三票里最差,因为价格已付完 FY26 共识;按提交快照 64.19(5/08),R/R≈0.87 同样不达标。结论:当前不允许任何仓位(WATCH_ONLY)。重新进入路径:(a) 价格回落至 ≤54.7(bar 价;6/8 恐慌低点 64.08 都还差 -15%,即需要一次真正的主题出清);(b) 七月中业绩预告/八月半年报 E1 兑现后重算区间——若垫 H1 ≥+50% 且 GM ≥52%,base/bull 区间整体上移,会在更高价位满足 2:1。注意 6/17 除权(10派1)与 6/30 起的高管减持窗口。任何执行前必须取实时价;human_executes——系统只建议、不下单。
summary.en: BOTH references fail the bar: at the 6/11 live 75.48 (E2 feed) R/R ≈0.29 — the STRONGEST fundamentals of the three sheets (Q1 resonance printed) but the WORST entry math, because the price has already paid the FY26 consensus; at the committed 64.19 (5/08) R/R ≈0.87, also failing. Conclusion: NO position now (WATCH_ONLY). Re-entry paths: (a) pullback to ≤54.7 (bar price; even the 6/8 panic low 64.08 sits 15% above it — a genuine theme washout is required); (b) the mid-July forecast / August H1 E1 prints re-base the band — if H1 pads ≥+50% and GM ≥52%, base/bull shift up and the bar is met at higher prices. Mind the 6/17 ex-date (10派1) and the management selling window from 6/30. Pull a live quote before ANY execution; human_executes — the system suggests, never trades.

execution_plan.entry: committed reference 64.19 (universe_a 5/08 snapshot; live 75.48 on 2026-06-11 E2); NO entry at current — add zone = ≤54.67 (bar met) OR post-E1 re-band on printed H1 numbers
execution_plan.staging: WATCH now (no position) → STARTER only inside the add zone or after the July-forecast/August-report re-band → conviction requires R/R ≥2:1 on the re-based band; never average into a fired wrong_if
execution_plan.invalidation: price: n/a while flat; thesis: any mechanized wrong_if trigger kills the thesis and the name reverts to pool-watch
execution_plan.sizing_suggestion: tier: NONE at reference (WATCH_ONLY); STARTER_CAPPED inside the add zone [suggestion only — human_executes; the system never auto-trades or sizes]
execution_plan.holding_horizon: 6-12 months from first entry (if ever); thesis resolves in stages: ~7/15 forecast → 8/2x H1 report → FY26 annual
review_dates: 2026-07-11 (30d: 预告前夜 — 7 月中预告为第一分辨点)

serenity.theme_system_change: A股 AI 半导体(Scan #1 #68):存储扩产(长存三期 2026H2 量产、长鑫 Fab3)× CMP 步数随多重曝光/HBM 倍增 × 耗材按片消耗 + 认证锁定 = 国产材料在位者的制度性增量
value_chain_map: L1 薄膜沉积+混合键合(最紧)
L2 HBM后段+存储封测闸门
L3 CMP全链 设备+垫+液(本票:垫=近垄断耗材,垄断结构最清晰层)
L7 前驱体/靶材(产能有余,降级)
L9 算力芯片设计(非瓶颈,降级)
serenity.scarce_layer: L3 — 垫是每道 CMP 的持续耗材,断供 = 全线停抛;认证 1-2 年使替换不可即时;国产唯一全流程供应商(公司口径)

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 硬垫月产能 5 万片(武汉)+ 软垫潜江 50 万片/年 ~80% 利用率;Q1 垫收入 +71.2% 环比 +27%(量价齐升的打印证据)
bottleneck_evidence.source: IR记录 5/08 + 6/09 扩建公告 PDF + 业绩预告变动说明 4/16

bottleneck_evidence.claim: 氧化铈抛光液通过国内龙头存储企业全流程验证并获批量订单;铜阻挡层/SiC衬底/TSV 液批量订单;头部晶圆厂优秀供应商奖
国内份额 ~70% 为媒体/卖方口径(公司原文仅'持续领先/唯一全流程')— 证据等级如实降档,论点不依赖
bottleneck_evidence.source: 新浪调研速递 5/09 vs 公司 IR 记录×4 原文比对

serenity.market_may_be_missing: 三点:(a) 耗材扩产的资本效率(30 万片/年新线仅 3000 万 capex)使存储扩产的增量利润边际资本占用≈0——市场用'主题材料股'框架而非'耗材复利'框架定价;(b) 液类/先进封装材料二次曲线从 0.85 亿/Q 低基数的公告级突破尚未单独定价;(c) TGV 玻璃基板垫新品类 = 3000 万 capex 的免费期权。反向:64-68× FY26E 说明'垫的故事'本身已是共识——缺口只在二次曲线与资本效率
serenity.substitution_route: DuPont/Cabot 以价格防守(主风险,打 GM);国产二供(江丰垫体尝试等)技术代差大(弱);客户自研不可行 — 短期替代威胁低,中期看外资价格战
serenity.expansion_difficulty: 认证 1-2 年 + 全流程适配 + 与长江存储共持发明专利(E2);自身扩产难度极低(耗材产线 capex 小)— 难的是别人进来,不是自己扩
serenity.customer_validation: 头部晶圆厂优秀供应商奖(5/26 公告 E1);存储龙头全流程验证+批量订单(5/06 公告 E1,客户未点名);深度绑定头部晶圆厂(IR 原话);5 月密集机构调研(中欧 35 人、华夏+华泰 7 人等,E1 记录)

what_weakens_the_view.source: 业绩预告变动说明/定期报告分项

what_weakens_the_view.metric: 国内份额口径(媒体/卖方一致性)
what_weakens_the_view.threshold: 跌破 60% 的可信第三方口径出现
what_weakens_the_view.source: 卖方报告/行业研究(TECHCET 类)

what_weakens_the_view.threshold: 现金对价 > 5 亿(锂电后再次跨界 = 治理降档)
长存三期量产/长鑫 Fab3 公告级推迟
what_weakens_the_view.source: 客户公告/招股文件级信息(媒体口径不触发)

risk.fundamental: 需求是存储 capex 的衍生量——扩产时点递延则'量'的腿后移而估值先去主题化;外资(DuPont/Cabot)价格防守直接打在 GM 共振线上;皓飞整合(商誉 9.17 亿,+70.6%)与财务费用 +578% 是利润表内的现实拖累
risk.policy: 存储双雄扩产受大基金/政策节奏影响;耗材出口管制风险低但客户(长存)本身在实体清单语境内,间接政策暴露存在
risk.valuation: 64-68× FY26E 共识 PE 已付完成长;若 7 月预告低于 +40% 区间,E 与 PE 双杀——bear 36-42 即该情形的诚实下界;可转债深度价内(转股价 28.38)带来潜在股本蠕变
risk.liquidity: 创业板 20cm 制度放大双向波动(5/13 单日 +13.1%、5/29 单日 -9.95%);两融余额 10 日 +16.9% 说明杠杆资金在边际定价;成交 25-45 亿/日流动性本身无虞
risk.crowding_reflexivity: 'CMP 国产化双雄'已是卖方打包推荐的标准叙事(开源/东海覆盖+5 月密集调研)——本票的拥挤度在 Scan #1 标记为'中高升温';高管减持窗口(6/30-9/29)与年内 93 家半导体减持潮构成情绪逆风;sentiment feeds stubbed,拥挤监控部分盲区由两融/龙虎榜/调研记录代理 [data break]
